name: Adele

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes large recurring streaming, premium catalog value for evergreen ballads, and substantial songwriter participation on major records.

ownership.master_owner: Mix of label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears partly tied to songwriter-side interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No confirmed full catalog sale assumed in this estimate
ownership.notes: For global pop catalogs with strong composition involvement, the artist-side cut can stay high even while labels retain large master interests.

bio: Adele's catalog is built around emotionally direct ballads that continue to monetize at a high level across streaming and global recognition.
notable_for: Power ballads, elite vocal identity, and catalog songs with broad emotional replay value.
career_highlight: Her biggest singles remain among the most replayed modern pop ballads years after release.
revenue_drivers: Streaming remains strong because her songs fit heartbreak and vocal-focused playlists.
Global familiarity gives her catalog strong long-tail demand.
Prestige and emotional recognition increase sync and catalog value.
